message:
test(aws): verify safe describe/list/get patterns work with global flags

Regression coverage for the safe-pattern half of the 0ecceaa class
sweep: `aws-describe`/`aws-list`/`aws-get` now allowlist read-only
commands even when `--profile`/`--region` precede the service, so
multi-profile users don't get FALSELY BLOCKED by some other
destructive pattern that might otherwise catch them. Pure read
paths must stay fast-and-permissive.

Also covers the `aws-vault exec prod -- aws ec2 describe-instances`
wrapper shape for the safe side (destructive side was covered in
1b0f991).
